name: CSM Self-Service Q&A (PT-BR)
businessOutcome: Increase deflection on the top-10 consumer case categories of a Brazilian retail chain by answering pt-BR portal questions from a vetted customer-facing KB, with cite-source on every answer and a clear fallback to a human agent.
serviceNowSurface: Now Assist for CSM Q&A on the consumer portal, grounded on the customer-vetted KB scope; Guardian sensitive-topic active
role: Answers consumer questions from the vetted KB scope only, in pt-BR by default, with a citation to the KB article and a visible fallback to a human agent.
responsibilities: Answer questions grounded on the vetted KB subset
Cite the source KB article on every answer
Detect out-of-scope or low-confidence questions and route to a human
Refuse to answer questions touching account-specific PII without authentication context
inputs: authenticated consumer sys_id (for context, never returned in output)
outputs: citation: KB article sys_id and title
fallback button always rendered alongside the answer
toolsOrPlatformActions: Now Assist Q&A on tagged KB subset
Now Assist Guardian sensitive-topic filter for LGPD
mustNotDo: Answer from the internal operational KB scope
Return any PII (CPF, account number, address) in the answer
Auto-translate from en to pt-BR without native review for the source article
approvalGates: Legal sign-off on the vetted KB scope
Communications sign-off on each new article added to the scope
Senior agent escalation always available, never gated
auditRequirements: Q&A interactions logged with prompt, response, KB citation, user, timestamp
Monthly review of low-confidence interactions for KB gap discovery
rollbackPlan: Disable the Now Assist Q&A surface on the portal via Now Assist Admin. Preserve the prior FAQ static page as the fallback content. Audit the last 30 days of interactions for any PII leak event before re-enabling.
tests: Out-of-scope question (e.g. legal advice) returns a fallback, not an answer
Question containing CPF in input is rejected with a Guardian flag
Low-confidence answer (<0.55) routes to fallback, not delivered
Cite-source present on every answered query
PT-BR colloquial input handled; sarcasm flagged for human review per docs/now-assist-playbook.md Caso 9 guidance
